name: Treasury Bills Sessions Report - Chart
report_script:
columns = [
    {
        "fieldname": "name",
        "label": _("Name"),
        "fieldtype": "Link",
        "options": "Treasury bills",
        "width": 150
    },
    {
        "fieldname": "posting_date",
        "label": _("Posting Date"),
        "fieldtype": "Date",
        "width": 150
    },
    {
        "fieldname": "term_type",
        "label": _("Term Type"),
        "fieldtype": "Data",
        "width": 150
    },
    {
        "fieldname": "duration",
        "label": _("Duration"),
        "fieldtype": "Int",
        "width": 150
    },
    {
        "fieldname": "bidding_status",
        "label": _("Bidding Status"),
        "fieldtype": "Data",
        "width": 150
    },
    {
        "fieldname": "custom_required_amount",
        "label": _("Required Amount"),
        "fieldtype": "Currency",
        "width": 150
    },
    {
        "fieldname": "custom_amounts_shown",
        "label": _("Amounts Shown"),
        "fieldtype": "Currency",
        "width": 150
    },
    {
        "fieldname": "custom_amounts_executed",
        "label": _("Amounts Executed"),
        "fieldtype": "Currency",
        "width": 150
    },
    {
        "fieldname": "announced_higher",
        "label": _("Announced Higher"),
        "fieldtype": "Currency",
        "width": 150
    },
    {
        "fieldname": "announced_less",
        "label": _("Announced Less"),
        "fieldtype": "Currency",
        "width": 150
    },
    {
        "fieldname": "announced_average",
        "label": _("Announced Average"),
        "fieldtype": "Currency",
        "width": 150
    },
    {
        "fieldname": "executed_higher",
        "label": _("Executed Higher"),
        "fieldtype": "Currency",
        "width": 150
    },
    {
        "fieldname": "executed_less",
        "label": _("Executed Less"),
        "fieldtype": "Currency",
        "width": 150
    },
    {
        "fieldname": "executed_average",
        "label": _("Executed Average"),
        "fieldtype": "Currency",
        "width": 150
    }
]

# Get values from filters or set them to None
posting_date = filters.get("posting_date")
term_type = filters.get("term_type")
duration = filters.get("duration")

conditions = []
if posting_date:
    conditions.append("`tabTreasury bills`.`posting_date` LIKE %(posting_date)s")
if term_type:
    conditions.append("`tabTreasury bills`.`term_type` LIKE  %(term_type)s")
if duration:
    conditions.append("`tabTreasury bills`.`duration` LIKE %(duration)s")

conditions_str = " AND ".join(conditions) if conditions else ""

sql = f"""SELECT
            `tabTreasury bills`.`name` AS `name`,
            `tabTreasury bills`.`posting_date`,
            `tabTreasury bills`.`term_type`,
            `tabTreasury bills`.`duration`,
            `tabTreasury bills`.`bidding_status`,
            `tabTreasury bills`.`custom_required_amount`,
            `tabTreasury bills`.`custom_amounts_shown`,
            `tabTreasury bills`.`custom_amounts_executed`,
            `tabAnnounced prices`.`higher` AS `announced_higher`,
            `tabAnnounced prices`.`less` AS `announced_less`,
            `tabAnnounced prices`.`average` AS `announced_average`,
            `tabExecuted prices`.`higher` AS `executed_higher`,
            `tabExecuted prices`.`less` AS `executed_less`,
            `tabExecuted prices`.`average` AS `executed_average`
        FROM
            `tabTreasury bills`
        LEFT JOIN
            `tabAnnounced prices` ON `tabTreasury bills`.`name` = `tabAnnounced prices`.`parent`
        LEFT JOIN
            `tabExecuted prices` ON `tabTreasury bills`.`name` = `tabExecuted prices`.`parent`
        WHERE
            `tabTreasury bills`.`treasury_bills` = 'Session data' 
            {'AND ' + conditions_str if conditions_str else ''}
"""

mydata = frappe.db.sql(sql, {
    "posting_date": f"%{posting_date}%" if posting_date else None,
    "term_type": f"%{term_type}%" if term_type else None,
    "duration": f"%{duration}%" if duration else None
}, as_dict=True)

chart = {
    'data': {
        'labels': [data['posting_date'] for data in mydata],
        'datasets': [
            {'name': 'announced_less', 'values': [data['announced_less'] for data in mydata], 'chartType': 'line'},
            {'name': 'announced_average', 'values': [data['announced_average'] for data in mydata], 'chartType': 'line'},
            {'name': 'announced_higher', 'values': [data['announced_higher'] for data in mydata], 'chartType': 'line'}
        ]
    },
    'type': 'line'
}

data = columns, mydata, None , chart

name: تقرير جلسات اذون الخزانه شارت
report_script:
columns = [
        _("name:Link/Treasury bills") + "::150",
        _("posting_date") + "::150",
        _("term_type") + "::150",
        _("duration") + "::150",
        _("bidding_status") + "::150",
        _("custom_required_amount") + "::150",
        _("custom_amounts_shown") + "::150",
        _("custom_amounts_executed") + "::150",
        _("announced_higher") + "::150",
        _("announced_less") + "::150",
        _("announced_average") + "::150",
        _("executed_higher") + "::150",
        _("executed_less") + "::150",
        _("executed_average") + "::150",
]

# Get values from filters or set them to None
posting_date = filters.get("posting_date")
term_type = filters.get("term_type")
duration = filters.get("duration")

conditions = []
if posting_date:
    conditions.append("`tabTreasury bills`.`posting_date` LIKE %(posting_date)s")
if term_type:
    conditions.append("`tabTreasury bills`.`term_type` LIKE  %(term_type)s")
if duration:
    conditions.append("`tabTreasury bills`.`duration` LIKE %(duration)s")

conditions_str = " AND ".join(conditions) if conditions else ""

sql = f"""SELECT
            `tabTreasury bills`.`name` AS `name`,
            `tabTreasury bills`.`posting_date`,
            `tabTreasury bills`.`term_type`,
            `tabTreasury bills`.`duration`,
            `tabTreasury bills`.`bidding_status`,
            `tabTreasury bills`.`custom_required_amount`,
            `tabTreasury bills`.`custom_amounts_shown`,
            `tabTreasury bills`.`custom_amounts_executed`,
            `tabAnnounced prices`.`higher` AS `announced_higher`,
            `tabAnnounced prices`.`less` AS `announced_less`,
            `tabAnnounced prices`.`average` AS `announced_average`,
            `tabExecuted prices`.`higher` AS `executed_higher`,
            `tabExecuted prices`.`less` AS `executed_less`,
            `tabExecuted prices`.`average` AS `executed_average`
        FROM
            `tabTreasury bills`
        LEFT JOIN
            `tabAnnounced prices` ON `tabTreasury bills`.`name` = `tabAnnounced prices`.`parent`
        LEFT JOIN
            `tabExecuted prices` ON `tabTreasury bills`.`name` = `tabExecuted prices`.`parent`
        WHERE
            `tabTreasury bills`.`treasury_bills` = 'Session data' 
            {'AND ' + conditions_str if conditions_str else ''}
"""

mydata = frappe.db.sql(sql, {
    "posting_date": f"%{posting_date}%" if posting_date else None,
    "term_type": f"%{term_type}%" if term_type else None,
    "duration": f"%{duration}%" if duration else None
}, as_dict=True)

chart = {
    'data': {
        'labels': [data['posting_date'] for data in mydata],
        'datasets': [
            {'name': 'announced_less', 'values': [data['announced_less'] for data in mydata], 'chartType': 'line'},
            {'name': 'announced_average', 'values': [data['announced_average'] for data in mydata], 'chartType': 'line'},
            {'name': 'announced_higher', 'values': [data['announced_higher'] for data in mydata], 'chartType': 'line'}
        ]
    },
    'type': 'line'
}

data = columns, mydata, None , chart
